title: geum × teszlense
intro: Geum × teszlense, also known as the hybrid avens, is a cross between the Geum montanum and Geum urbanum species of flowering plants in the rose family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it has been used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Geum × teszlense include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. Geum × teszlense can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
